channel_specificity.primary_endpoint_requirement: primary paired dirty-probe law must independently pass all primary gates
channel_specificity.secondary_channel_policy: secondary channels may pass or fail without invalidating the primary result and may not substitute for primary endpoint failure

observable_law.mapping_policy_reason: Runtime maps logical query lanes through the same map variant used during preparation; map is therefore a consistency factor for logical query_A/query_B, not a sign inversion.
